message:
feat(mission): tx plan DAG compiler with preconditions and compensation graph (ft-1i2ge.8.3)

New tx_plan_compiler module: compile_tx_plan() turns planner assignments
into an executable DAG with topological ordering, parallel levels,
preconditions (PolicyApproved, ReservationHeld, ApprovalRequired,
TargetReachable, ContextFresh), compensating actions (Rollback,
NotifyOperator, RetryWithBackoff, SkipAndContinue, Alternative),
risk classification, and deterministic FNV-1a plan hash. 30 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
